interpretation_summary: The replication attempt encountered persistent execution failures due to encoding and locale issues in the R script. Despite correcting file paths and attempting to set encoding, the script failed to execute successfully. This indicates a failure in the execution phase due to method/alignment issues and possibly data-related issues.

fidelity_assessment.method_alignment: Partial alignment: The R script followed the planned analysis steps but encountered encoding and locale issues that prevented successful execution.

deviations.issue_description: Encoding and locale issues in the R script.
deviations.impact: High: Prevented successful execution of the replication analysis.

results_comparison.hypothesis_tested: Participants in the lottery condition will have a lower mean willingness to pay than participants in the gift card condition.
results_comparison.original_results: Frames highly associated with risk led to lower WTP compared to frames not associated with risk. WTA was not influenced by the frame. (ηp² = 0.11, p < 0.001)
results_comparison.replication_results: Replication results could not be obtained due to execution failures.
results_comparison.overall_answer: No, the replication results could not be obtained due to execution failures.

replication_report: Replication unsuccessful: Execution failures due to encoding and locale issues prevented analysis.

failure_handling.suggestions: Ensure proper locale settings in the R environment and handle encoding issues in the data files.
Verify data file encoding and column names to prevent multibyte string errors.

notes: The replication attempt was hindered by technical issues related to encoding and locale settings. Future attempts should ensure proper handling of data encoding and locale settings in the R environment.
